sourceScope.primarySourceFile: AG 12 - Interpretation Regarding Valuation and Non-Forfeiture Interest Rates.pdf
sourceScope.sourceTitle: AG 12 - Interpretation Regarding Valuation and Non-Forfeiture Interest Rates

observedSectionWindows.note: Single-page historical note for the withdrawn valuation and nonforfeiture interest-rate interpretation.

boundaries: Keep planning focused on this single AG 12 PDF.
Do not widen into AG 13 or later guideline files.
Keep the withdrawn / historical posture explicit in every batch artifact.
Treat the guideline as caveat-only historical material, not active guidance.
Keep any PDF text-extraction noise visible as a caveat, not a promotion signal.
Keep the batch source-bound and review-only.
exclusions: No eLearning scripts, slides, quizzes, or app exports.
No raw source files in Git.
No other guideline files in the same wave.

topicMap.label: Withdrawn interpretation regarding valuation and nonforfeiture interest rates
topicMap.boundaryNote: Keep this slice within page 1 and do not absorb later guideline files.

proposedBatches.title: Single-page AG 12 withdrawn historical note

pageTarget.notes: Capture the whole one-page withdrawn guideline as a single review-only slice and stop at the page boundary.

proposedBatches.rationale: Capture the full one-page withdrawn guideline as a single review-only slice and stop at the page boundary.

reviewStandards.regulatoryRequirement: Treat explicit must, shall, or required language as the requirement; preserve the citation and source context.
reviewStandards.definitionOrTerminology: Treat valuation and nonforfeiture interest-rate language as historical context unless it imposes a current duty.
reviewStandards.caveatOnlyHistoricalNote: Treat the withdrawn-status notice and historical framing as caveat-only material, not active guidance.
reviewStandards.crossReferenceMapping: Treat references to valuation and nonforfeiture interest rates or the withdrawn note as mapping notes unless operational text is included.
reviewStandards.backgroundContent: Treat the title line and framing sentence as background content unless they impose a duty.
reviewStandards.boundaryControlWindow: Treat the one-page slice as a review-only window that should not be merged forward.
reviewStandards.requiresHumanInterpretation: Treat the indexing choice and the OCR / encoded text layer as requiring human actuarial interpretation unless the text is explicit.
reviewStandards.sourceQualityCaveat: Treat text-layer noise as review-only caveats and do not widen the batch because of them.

appReady: export is sanitized, stable, and versioned
ragReady: review status no longer requires human disposition

currentChecksNeeded: Plan file exists and parses as JSON.
The AG 12 plan markdown exists and carries the expected headings.
Every proposed batch is review-only by default.
The plan keeps the scope to one page only.
The source posture is explicitly withdrawn.
Each planned batch has a matching batch definition.
The AG 12 batch definition file stays synchronized with the plan.
futureChecksSuggested: Single-page guideline checks for future short guideline files.
No learner-facing, app-ready, or RAG-ready promotion checks.
Text-layer quality caveat checks once extraction starts.
scriptImplications: scripts/ag12-batch-definitions.mjs should stay synchronized with the planned batch-090 slice when extraction is authorized.
scripts/batch-definitions.mjs should import the AG 12 definition file so the shared runner can find the planned batch ID.
scripts/validate-scaffold.mjs should verify that the AG 12 plan file exists, parses cleanly, and preserves the review-only posture.
The shared runner should continue to honor the same stop conditions used for the VM-20 batches.

notes: Controlled AG 12 planning artifact. Planned batch 090 remains review-only by default and is not an extraction run.
